overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} 1 = \sum_ {n = 0} ^ {\infty} P \{n \text {   in   system } \} \\ = P (0) \lim _ {s \rightarrow 1} \frac {(1 - s) \tilde {G} (\lambda (1 - s))}{\tilde {G} (\lambda (1 - s)) - s} \\ = P (0) \frac {\lim _ {s \rightarrow 1} \frac {d}{d s} (1 - s)}{\lim _ {s \rightarrow 1} \frac {d}{d s} [ \tilde {G} (\lambda (1 - s)) - s ]} \quad \text {(by L'hopital's rule since \tilde {G} (0) = 1)} \\ = \frac {P (0)}{1 - \lambda E [ S ]} \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} 1 = \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} P\{n \text{ in system }\} \\ = P(0) \lim_{s\rightarrow 1} \frac{(1-s)\tilde{G}(\lambda(1-s))}{\tilde{G}(\lambda(1-s))-s} \\ = P(0) \frac{\lim_{s\rightarrow 1} \frac{d}{ds}(1-s)}{\lim_{s\rightarrow 1} \frac{d}{ds}[\tilde{G}(\lambda(1-s))-s]} \quad \text{(by L'hopital's rule since } \tilde{G}(0)=1\text{)} \\ = \frac{P(0)}{1-\lambda E[S]} \\ \end{array}
